title: Archive Only Residue Pressure
goal: Surface archive-only future-relevant residue as a routing problem without making archive reading part of ordinary startup.
non_goals: Do not treat all archived plans as suspect.
Do not add broad full-text archive scans to first-contact startup.

intent.outcome: Summary/report/doctor pressure identifies archived durable residue that points nowhere or remains evidence-only.
intent.constraints: Scan compact archive metadata only and recommend routing residue to Memory/docs/contracts/checks/planning.
intent.latitude: Add planning-package inspection fields and root report maintenance pressure if needed.
intent.escalation: Escalate if the implementation requires broad archive text mining or startup expansion.

execution.next_step: Archive this plan, close #494, refresh external evidence, then promote #495.
execution.proof: Planning package tests, workspace CLI tests, ruff checks, proof selector, planning doctor, root CLI authority review, planning-surface check, and maintenance-pressure report inspection passed.

invariants: Historical archives remain evidence, not ordinary operating input.
Recommended action is to route residue, not read more archives.
Quiet ordinary state is not blocked unless archive-only residue is selected/current or maintenance pressure is explicitly inspected.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: Route durable motivation and lessons out of planning archives.

required_continuation.activation trigger: After #494 closes, promote #495 if still open.

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: Archive-only residue becomes visible as a routing signal.
iterative_follow_through.proof achieved now: Finished-work inspection now detects archive-only durable residue and workspace maintenance pressure exposes an archive_only_residue category.

intent_interpretation.inferred intended outcome: Continue the durable-residue-routing lane in order.
intent_interpretation.review guidance: Verify the warning points to residue routing rather than archive reading.

execution_bounds.allowed paths: Planning finished-work inspection, root report maintenance-pressure routing if needed, focused tests, planning state/execplan.
execution_bounds.required validation commands: uv run pytest packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py -q; cd packages/planning; uv run ruff check .; uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q if workspace report changes; uv run ruff check src tests if workspace code changes; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py
execution_bounds.ask-before-refactor threshold: Any broad report/summary rewrite or archive full-text index.
execution_bounds.stop before touching: Memory package behavior unless proof shows #494 requires it.

stop_conditions.stop when: #494 acceptance is met, validated, archived, committed, pushed, closed, and external evidence refreshed.
stop_conditions.escalate when boundary reached: If archive-only residue detection would require reading arbitrary archived prose by default.
stop_conditions.escalate on scope drift: If the work turns into #495 self-improvement closeout policy.
stop_conditions.escalate on proof failure: If selected proof points outside planning/report routing.

context_budget.live working set: planning installer finished-work inspection, maintenance-pressure report code, focused tests, active execplan.
context_budget.externalize before shift: Update this execplan with proof and closeout.
context_budget.pre-work memory pull: not needed unless compact output points there.
context_budget.context-shift triggers: Before moving to #495 or after proof failure.

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Implement remaining planned work lane by lane.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Dogfood package; commit/push per milestone; preserve repo-/agent-/tool-/language-agnostic shipped package behavior.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Exact warning field names and where to surface the compact pressure.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: Archive scanning becomes broad or startup-heavy.

active_milestone.scope: Planning/report warning for archive-only future-relevant residue

immediate_next_action: Inspect finished-work inspection and maintenance-pressure code paths, then add compact archive-only residue signal and tests.
invariants: Archives are historical evidence, not ordinary startup input.
Archive-only durable residue should route to a stronger owner.
Warnings should stay compact and selector-driven.
contract_decisions_to_freeze: Archive-only durable residue means compact archived durable_residue metadata declares future relevance while the canonical owner is missing, none, archive-only, or evidence-only.
open_questions_to_close: Should the signal live in planning finished-work inspection only, or also become a first-class maintenance-pressure category?
validation_commands: cd packages/planning; uv run ruff check .
uv run ruff check src tests
completion_criteria: Archive-only future-relevant intent is visible as a warning or maintenance-pressure signal.
The recommended action is to route residue, not read more archives.
Ordinary quiet state is not blocked by historical archive evidence unless the residue is selected/current.
Tests cover an archive-only durable-residue warning.

execution_run.what happened: Added a finished-work inspection signal for archive-only durable residue, surfaced it as a workspace maintenance-pressure category, and covered both the signal and router shape in tests.
execution_run.scope touched: planning finished-work inspection, workspace maintenance-pressure report routing, focused tests, planning state and active execplan
execution_run.validations run: uv run pytest packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py -q; uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q; cd packages/planning; uv run ruff check .; uv run ruff check src tests; uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed <paths> --format json; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json; uv run agentic-workspace defaults --section root_cli_authority --format json; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py; uv run agentic-workspace report --target . --section maintenance_pressure --format json
execution_run.result for continuation: #494 acceptance is satisfied; #495 remains in durable-residue-routing.
execution_run.next step: Archive this plan with cleanup and continue #495.

finished_run_review.config compliance: summary/report used before promotion; proof selector, planning doctor, root CLI authority review, and maintenance-pressure report used during validation
finished_run_review.follow-on decision: Archive #494 but keep #491 lane open for #495.

proof_report.proof achieved now: Archive-only future-relevant durable residue is visible as a finished-work inspection signal and maintenance-pressure category, with recommendations to route residue rather than read archives.
proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py covers the archive-only durable-residue warning; tests/test_workspace_cli.py covers the maintenance-pressure router category.

intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: Finished-work inspection emits archive_only_durable_residue signals from compact durable_residue metadata; workspace maintenance pressure exposes archive_only_residue and points to stronger ownership.

system_intent_alignment.relevant system intent: Make the package cheaper to enter and recover from while preserving leverage.
system_intent_alignment.slice shaping bias: Surface routing pressure without expanding startup archive reading.
system_intent_alignment.broader-lane validation question: Can archives stop being the only place future-relevant motivation lives?

closure_check.why this decision is honest: #494 is complete, but #491 still has #495 open for self-improvement closeout routing.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: archive_only_durable_residue finished-work signal, archive_only_residue maintenance-pressure category, and focused tests.
closure_check.reopen trigger: Archive-only future-relevant residue is not surfaced as a routing problem or the recommendation tells agents to read archives instead of route residue.

durable_residue.learned constraint: Archive-only durable residue should become routing pressure instead of normalizing archive dredging.
durable_residue.motivation worth preserving: The package should make the cheaper path be routing residue to an owner, not teaching agents to search old plans.
durable_residue.promotion trigger: After #494 lands, continue #495 for self-improvement closeout enforcement.
